description_long: This is a large, blocky hammer with a rectangular, metallic head featuring beveled edges and subtle engraved patterns on its sides. The head is a dark gray color, with a slightly lighter striking face and intricate decorative motifs on two of its faces. The handle is cylindrical, wrapped in a spiral pattern with a golden or brass-colored grip, and appears to be made of a sturdy material, possibly metal or reinforced wood. The handle is relatively short compared to the massive head, suggesting the hammer is designed for powerful, controlled strikes rather than precision work. The overall design is reminiscent of a ceremonial or fantasy hammer, with a robust and imposing appearance. There are no visible signs of wear, branding, or additional attachments.
description: A large, ornate hammer with a dark rectangular head featuring engraved patterns and a short, spiral-wrapped handle in gold and brown. The design is robust and decorative, suggesting ceremonial or fantasy use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flat striking face of the hammer head, with beveled edges and a plain, dark surface.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the engraved decorative pattern on the head and the full length of the spiral-wrapped handle.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the end of the handle and the top face of the hammer head, showing the spiral grip and metallic finish.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the other engraved face of the head and the handle's spiral wrapping.
attribute_handle_type: Short, cylindrical handle with a spiral-wrapped golden grip, likely leather or synthetic, providing a textured, grippy surface.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular, block-style hammer head with beveled edges and engraved decorative patterns; no claws or peens, resembling a ceremonial or sledge type.
